awards: Nominated for 1 Oscar. 9 wins & 26 nominations total
actors: William H. Macy, Maria Bello, Alec Baldwin
plot: The unluckiest man in Vegas - a guy whose bad luck is contagious - is used by the last of the old time mob run casinos to kill high rollers' action. That is, until he falls in love with a cocktail waitress and gets "lady luck," which throws the situation into reverse. Things turn nasty when the casino director tries to break up the romance.
